title: hypericum neurocalycinum
intro: Hypericum neurocalycinum, also known as the Mountain St. John's Wort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hypericaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to treat wounds, skin irritations, and anxiety due to its anti-inflammatory and adaptogenic properties. The plant's extracts have been used to promote mental health, reduce stress levels, and improve sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for overall well-being. Hypericum neurocalycinum is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically or internally to reap its benefits.
